structure.title: Janarddan Sarkar
structure.summary: I'm sorry, but you haven't provided a partial document for me to describe. Please provide the relevant part of the document so I can assist you better.

structure.title: Education
structure.summary:
The partial document covers several main points:

1. **Professional Experience**: The individual has extensive experience in various roles within technology companies such as EXL Digital, Costrategix Technologies, and Continental AG.

2. **Technical Skills and Expertise**:
   - **Machine Learning and Data Science**: Demonstrated proficiency in data processing, feature engineering, and generative AI solutions.
   - **Data Visualization and Analysis**: Experience with computer vision models for traffic sign recognition and improving accuracy in ADAS systems.
   - **Project Development**: Worked on projects like Video RAG, Agentic MixRAG, Knowledge Extraction System (KEIS), Smart QA-Assistant, SQL AI Assistant, Semantic Datatype Detection, Next-Gen ADAS Classifier Toolchain, and Traffic Sign Captioning Prototype.

3. **Publications and Research Contributions**:
   - Published a paper titled "Caption Generation for Traffic Signs Using a Deep Neural Scheme" at the SAE International Conference in 2022.
   - Contributed to projects like Video RAG, Agentic MixRAG, Knowledge Extraction System (KEIS), Smart QA-Assistant, SQL AI Assistant, Semantic Datatype Detection, Next-Gen ADAS Classifier Toolchain, and Traffic Sign Captioning Prototype.

4. **Educational Background**:
   - Holds a Master of Technology in Machine Learning and Computing from Indian Institute of Space Science and Technology.
   - Completed Bachelor's degrees in Computer Science and Engineering from Central Institute of Technology.

5. **Certifications**: The individual has obtained certifications such as Microsoft Certified: Azure Data Scientist Associate, highlighting their proficiency in data science and machine learning.

6. **Programming Languages and Technologies**:
   - Proficient in Python, TensorFlow, Keras, PyTorch, OpenCV, Scikit-learn, Flask, FastAPI, JavaScript, C++, C.
   - Familiar with databases like MySQL, SQLite, MongoDB, PostgreSQL.
   - Experienced with technologies such as GenAI, RAG, GraphRAG, CRAG, Vectorless RAG, Prompt Engineering, LangChain, LangGraph, LangSmith, Agentic AI, Vector DBs, Databricks, AWS, Azure, LLM Fine-tuning, Docker, MLflow, Web Technologies, and VPS.

7. **Projects**: The individual has developed several projects that showcase their expertise in various domains including data science, machine learning, project management, and software development. These include Video RAG, Agentic MixRAG, Knowledge Extraction System (KEIS), Smart QA-Assistant, SQL AI Assistant, Semantic Datatype Detection, Next-Gen ADAS Classifier Toolchain, Traffic Sign Captioning Prototype, and Personal Portfolio Website.

8. **Certifications**: The individual has demonstrated their proficiency in data science through certifications such as Microsoft Certified: Azure Data Scientist Associate.

This document provides a comprehensive overview of the professional background, technical skills, educational achievements, and project experience of Janarddan Sarkar.
structure.text:
Janarddan SarkarEmail: janarddansarkar@gmail.com
Website: janarddansarkar.dev Mobile: +91-8638486904
LinkedIn: janarddan-sarkar GitHub: 2597688js
Education
•Indian Institute of Space Science and TechnologyThiruvananthapuram, Kerala
M.Tech in Machine Learning and Computing Jul 2019 – Jun 2021
•Central Institute of TechnologyKokrajhar, Assam
B.Tech in Computer Science and Engineering Jul 2015 – Jun 2019
Experience
•EXL Digital Bengaluru, India
Manager Data Scientist Feb 2025 – Present
◦Roles and responsibilities: Driving data processing, feature engineering, and Generative AI solutions for insurance claim
stabilization using RAG and Agentic architectures.
•Costrategix TechnologiesBengaluru, India
Data Scientist Jun 2023 – Feb 2025
◦Roles and responsibilities: Built synthetic datasets, ML pipelines, and enhanced product performance through advanced
preprocessing, model optimization, and feature engineering.
•Continental AG Bengaluru, India
Engineer – Machine Learning (Promoted from Intern) Oct 2020 – Jun 2023
◦Roles and responsibilities: Developed and optimized computer vision models for traffic sign and signal recognition,
improving accuracy and deployment reliability in ADAS systems.
Publications
•Caption Generation for Traffic Signs Using a Deep Neural SchemeSAE International Conference
Link: https://www.sae.org/publications/technical-papers/content/2022-28-0006/ 2022
Projects
•Video RAG – Chat with YouTube Videos (2026): Built an AI-powered Video RAG application that lets users chat with
YouTube videos by analyzing the visual content such as diagrams, code snippets, and slides using OpenCV, Gemini Vision,
ChromaDB, and Streamlit.
•Personal Portfolio Website (2025): Developed a full-stack personal portfolio website with a React frontend and FastAPI
backend API, featuring a Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) AI chatbot to showcase professional work and projects while
providing intelligent portfolio-related assistance.
•Agentic MixRAG (2025): Agentic RAG application that processes documents, web content, and images to provide
context-aware, intelligent question answering. Integrated advanced features, including OCR, workflow visualization, memory
retention, and real-time streaming for enhanced user interaction and analytics.
•Knowledge Extraction and Insight System - KEIS (2025): Automated analysis of documents to detect status updates and
milestones, reducing manual review and improving efficiency.
•Smart QA-Assistant (2024): Developed a GenAI-powered Smart QA-Assistant that generates test plans, positive/negative test
cases, and business flow diagrams, reducing QA task completion time from 2 days to under an hour.
•SQL AI Assistant (2024): Developed a SQL AI assistant using GPT models to help users write SQL queries in natural
language. Enabled users to express data retrieval needs without knowing SQL syntax, with the system interpreting and generating
accurate SQL queries
•Semantic Datatype Detection (2023-2024): Utilize a deep learning model named Sherlock, with necessary updates, to detect
the semantic datatype within a given structured dataset, followed by substitution with GPT-based models.
•Next-Gen ADAS Classifier Toolchain (2021-2023): Developed deep learning-based classifier pipelines for next-generation
ADAS systems.
•Traffic Sign Captioning Prototype (2020-2021): Designed a deep learning solution combining computer vision concepts and
NLP techniques to generate captions for unknown traffic signs.
Certifications
•Microsoft Certified: Azure Data Scientist Associate
Programming Skills
•Languages: Python, TensorFlow, Keras, PyTorch, OpenCV, Scikit-learn, Flask, FastAPI, JavaScript, C++, C
•Databases: MySQL, SQLite, MongoDB, PostgreSQL
•Technologies: GenAI, RAG, GraphRAG, CRAG, Vectorless RAG, Prompt Engineering, LangChain, LangGraph, LangSmith,
Agentic AI, Vector DBs, Databricks, AWS, Azure, LLM Fine-tuning, Docker, MLflow, Web Technologies, VPS

•SQL AI Assistant (2024): Developed a SQL AI assistant using GPT models to help users write SQL queries in natural
language. Enabled users to express data retrieval needs without knowing SQL syntax, with the system interpreting and generating
accurate SQL queries
•Semantic Datatype Detection (2023-2024): Utilize a deep learning model named Sherlock, with necessary updates, to detect
the semantic datatype within a given structured dataset, followed by substitution with GPT-based models.
•Next-Gen ADAS Classifier Toolchain (2021-2023): Developed deep learning-based classifier pipelines for next-generation
ADAS systems.
•Traffic Sign Captioning Prototype (2020-2021): Designed a deep learning solution combining computer vision concepts and
NLP techniques to generate captions for unknown traffic signs.
